claim_under_attack: The platform strategy and challenge review contain an irreconcilable contradiction: the strategy commits to GraphQL-first by Q3 2026, while the challenge review classifies GraphQL gateway latency (1.2s P99 vs 200ms SLO) as a P0 blocker with 8-12 week remediation.
evidence_or_reason: The visible artifact does not show that these statements are actually irreconcilable. A Q3 2026 target and an 8-12 week remediation estimate could still be compatible depending on when in Q3 the cutover is planned, whether the estimate is calendar or engineering time, and whether the P0 blocker applies to immediate rollout or final consolidation readiness. No quoted source text or schedule detail is provided to prove that both documents cannot be satisfied together.
